recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule violation: NO_FLORIDA: Florida loads are permanently blocked
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.3/mile is below $2.51 minimum
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.5/mile is below $2.51 minimum; MAX_DEADHEAD: 200mi exceeds limit of 50mi for this load
ACCEPT — profit $395, strong lane, within iron rules
outcome: Delivered on time. Client satisfied.
lesson: TX→GA at $2.50+ with <50mi deadhead is consistently profitable

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule violation: NO_FLORIDA: Florida loads are permanently blocked
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.3/mile is below $2.51 minimum
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.5/mile is below $2.51 minimum; MAX_DEADHEAD: 200mi exceeds limit of 50mi for this load
ACCEPT — profit $395, strong lane, within iron rules
outcome: Delivered on time. Client satisfied.
lesson: TX→GA at $2.50+ with <50mi deadhead is consistently profitable

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule violation: NO_FLORIDA: Florida loads are permanently blocked
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.3/mile is below $2.51 minimum
REJECT — Iron Rule violation: MIN_RPM: $2.5/mile is below $2.51 minimum; MAX_DEADHEAD: 200mi exceeds limit of 50mi for this load
REJECT — Iron Rule 2 violation. RPM $2.48 < $2.51 minimum.
outcome: Correct rejection. Shipper never called back — load was a trap rate.
lesson: Always reject below $2.51. No exceptions. Even Chicago→Nashville which is a good lane.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 1. Florida origin. Do not calculate profit.
outcome: Correct. Florida is permanently excluded.
lesson: Reject Florida immediately. Do not run profit formula. Do not check carrier.

recommendation: ACCEPT — Profit 33.2%. Excellent. Book it.
outcome: Load delivered on time. Carrier paid. $428 profit realized.
lesson: Chicago→Nashville at $2.75/mi with <40mi deadhead is a reliable profitable lane.

recommendation: REJECT carrier match — deadhead 62mi exceeds 50mi hard cap. Seek next carrier.
outcome: Found closer carrier at 31mi deadhead. Load booked profitably.
lesson: Never expand deadhead. Always find a closer carrier instead.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 4. 48,200 lbs exceeds 48,000 lb maximum.
outcome: Correct. Checked next carrier — load was within limits on alternate equipment.
lesson: 200 lbs over is still over. Weight rule is absolute.

recommendation: ACCEPT — Priority load. RPM $3.15 exceeds $3.00 priority threshold. Profit 38.7%.
outcome: Delivered. $512 profit. Broker booked us again same week.
lesson: Dallas→Memphis at $3.00+ is a priority lane. Always chase it.

recommendation: REJECT — deadhead 55mi violates Iron Rule 3 hard cap of 50mi.
outcome: Correct rejection. Load went to another broker at lower rate anyway.
lesson: Even good RPM does not override deadhead rule.

recommendation: Assign carrier to Load B ($3.10 RPM, $612 profit). Hold Load A while searching pool.
outcome: Load B booked. Load A filled by second carrier found 20min later.
lesson: Always assign one carrier to highest-profit load first. Keep searching for Load A.

recommendation: REJECT — negative profit (-$45). Do not book. Escalate to Maya as Tier 2.
outcome: Correct. Negative profit loads destroy margin.
lesson: Never book a negative-profit load regardless of RPM or relationship.

recommendation: REJECT carrier — authority age 155 days, 25 days short of 180-day minimum.
outcome: Correct. Flagged for re-check at 180-day mark in 25 days.
lesson: New authority = higher risk. 180-day rule is firm.

recommendation: INELIGIBLE — authority age 140 days. 40 days short. Eligible 2026-05-15.
outcome: Correct. Carrier onboarded at 180-day mark with clean record.
lesson: Log pending-eligibility carriers with exact re-check date.

recommendation: TIER-2 ALERT — insurance expires in 6 days. Reduce load assignments. Contact carrier.
outcome: Carrier renewed insurance on day 4. No dispatch gap.
lesson: 7-day warning works. Early alert gives carrier time to renew.

recommendation: TIER-3 CRITICAL — safety rating changed to Conditional. Remove from dispatch pool immediately.
outcome: Carrier removed. 2 active loads reassigned to compliant carriers within 1 hour.
lesson: Conditional rating = immediate removal. No grace period.

recommendation: INELIGIBLE — cargo insurance $75K below $100K minimum.
outcome: Carrier updated policy to $150K. Re-applied and passed.
lesson: Never waive minimum insurance. $75K leaves business exposed.

recommendation: ELIGIBLE — all 4 checks pass. Proceed to onboarding.
outcome: Carrier onboarded. First load completed successfully.
lesson: 220-day authority + Unrated safety + clean record = strong candidate.

recommendation: Positive reply on Email 2. Book demo immediately. Respond within 2 hours.
outcome: Demo booked. Converted to trial carrier within 2 weeks.
lesson: Email 2 positive replies are hot. Drop everything and book same day.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — Canada lead. Market not yet operational. Log, do not sequence.
outcome: Lead saved for Canada launch. Responded with launch notification promise.
lesson: Never send USA sequence to Canada leads. Separate pipeline.

recommendation: HOT LEAD — 35 trucks, direct reply. Book discovery call with Onboarding immediately.
outcome: Discovery call booked. 8 trucks enrolled in 7-day trial.
lesson: 35+ truck carriers are tier-1 priority. Route to Onboarding same day.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — enterprise prospect. Pause sequence. Owner handles personally.
outcome: Owner took the call. Enterprise contract in negotiation.
lesson: Any prospect with 1000+ employees = stop sequence, escalate immediately.

recommendation: Convert to paid. 3 loads completed, positive feedback. Send $350/mo agreement.
outcome: Signed same day. Became a regular 2-load/week carrier.
lesson: Day 7 carriers who complete 3+ trial loads convert at 85%+ rate.

recommendation: TIER-2 FLAG — carrier not engaging. 0 loads, 3 no-replies on Day 5. Escalate.
outcome: Owner called directly. Carrier had a family emergency. Restarted trial.
lesson: Non-engagement by Day 5 needs a direct owner call, not more automation.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — load value $6,200 exceeds $5,000 threshold. Owner approval required.
outcome: Owner approved. Load booked. $1,100 profit.
lesson: $5K+ loads always escalate. Owner approves quickly when data is clean.

recommendation: TIER-3 BLOCK — legal contact. All outbound comms halted. Owner must respond.
outcome: Owner called back. Was a wrong number. All clear.
lesson: Attorney contact always TIER-3. Even false alarms are worth the caution.

inputs.pattern: Owner approves all Erin Iron Rule rejections immediately

recommendation: Pattern logged: Owner never overrides Iron Rule rejections. Auto-approve Iron Rule escalations.
outcome: Pattern confirmed across 11 decisions.
lesson: Iron Rule rejections have 100% owner agreement rate. Shadow can eventually auto-log these.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 2. RPM $2.47 below $2.51 minimum. Auto-reject.
outcome: Correct rejection confirmed. Shipper rate was $2.47/mi — below floor.
lesson: Sub-$2.51 RPM is always rejected. No negotiation. No exceptions.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 1. Florida origin. Immediate rejection.
outcome: Correct. Florida load rejected without further evaluation.
lesson: Florida = instant reject. Do not calculate profit. Do not check carrier.

recommendation: ACCEPT — Profit 40.4%. RPM $3. Book immediately.
outcome: Delivered. $460 profit realized. Carrier performed.
lesson: Chicago, IL→Nashville, TN at $3/mi is a reliable profitable lane.

recommendation: REJECT carrier match — deadhead 52mi exceeds 50mi hard cap. Search next carrier.
outcome: Found closer carrier within 50mi. Load booked.
lesson: Never expand deadhead limit. Find the next carrier.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 4. 48,050 lbs exceeds 48,000 lb maximum.
outcome: Correct rejection. Overweight load passed to flatbed broker.
lesson: Any weight over 48,000 lbs is rejected. No exceptions.

recommendation: INELIGIBLE — authority age 90 days. 90 days short. Eligible: 7/3/2026.
outcome: Correct. Carrier flagged for re-check at 180-day mark.
lesson: Log pending carriers with exact re-check date. Never waive authority age.

outcome: Carrier notified. Renewed insurance before expiry.
lesson: 11-day warning is enough lead time for renewal when carrier is notified promptly.

recommendation: TIER-3 CRITICAL — safety rating changed to Conditional. Remove from dispatch pool immediately.
outcome: Carrier removed. Active loads reassigned to compliant carriers.
lesson: Conditional rating = immediate removal. No grace period regardless of history.

recommendation: Unsubscribe request. Remove immediately. Log as disqualified.
outcome: Removed within 10 minutes. Compliant.
lesson: Unsubscribe requests must be actioned within 30 minutes.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — 60 trucks. Enterprise fleet. Owner handles.
outcome: Owner engaged. Contract discussion opened.
lesson: 50+ truck fleets — always escalate to owner.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — load value $6,700 exceeds $5,000 threshold.
outcome: Owner approved in 11 minutes. Load booked. Profit realized.
lesson: Owner approves $5K+ loads quickly when data package is complete.

recommendation: Continue trial — only 1 load completed. Schedule Day 7 call.
outcome: Trial extended. Converted on Day 9.
lesson: Single trial load needs more touchpoints before conversion ask.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 2. RPM $2.55 below $2.51 minimum. Auto-reject.
outcome: Correct rejection confirmed. Shipper rate was $2.55/mi — below floor.
lesson: Sub-$2.51 RPM is always rejected. No negotiation. No exceptions.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 1. Florida destination. Immediate rejection.
outcome: Correct. Florida load rejected without further evaluation.
lesson: Florida = instant reject. Do not calculate profit. Do not check carrier.

recommendation: ACCEPT — Profit 40.1%. RPM $3.06. Book immediately.
outcome: Delivered. $742.9 profit realized. Carrier performed.
lesson: St. Louis, MO→Kansas City, MO at $3.06/mi is a reliable profitable lane.

recommendation: REJECT carrier match — deadhead 70mi exceeds 50mi hard cap. Search next carrier.
outcome: Found closer carrier within 50mi. Load booked.
lesson: Never expand deadhead limit. Find the next carrier.

recommendation: REJECT — Iron Rule 4. 48,950 lbs exceeds 48,000 lb maximum.
outcome: Correct rejection. Overweight load passed to flatbed broker.
lesson: Any weight over 48,000 lbs is rejected. No exceptions.

recommendation: INELIGIBLE — authority age 180 days. 0 days short. Eligible: 4/4/2026.
outcome: Correct. Carrier flagged for re-check at 180-day mark.
lesson: Log pending carriers with exact re-check date. Never waive authority age.

recommendation: TIER-1 — insurance expires in 12 days. Log in weekly report.
outcome: Carrier notified. Renewed insurance before expiry.
lesson: 12-day warning is enough lead time for renewal when carrier is notified promptly.

recommendation: TIER-3 CRITICAL — safety rating changed to Unsatisfactory. Remove from dispatch pool immediately.
outcome: Carrier removed. Active loads reassigned to compliant carriers.
lesson: Unsatisfactory rating = immediate removal. No grace period regardless of history.

recommendation: Positive reply on Email 1. Book demo within 2 hours. Hot lead.
outcome: Demo booked. Lead moved to onboarding pipeline.
lesson: Email 1 positive replies convert. Same-day response is mandatory.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — 65 trucks. Enterprise fleet. Owner handles.
outcome: Owner engaged. Contract discussion opened.
lesson: 50+ truck fleets — always escalate to owner.

recommendation: TIER-2 ESCALATE — load value $6,900 exceeds $5,000 threshold.
outcome: Owner approved in 12 minutes. Load booked. Profit realized.
lesson: Owner approves $5K+ loads quickly when data package is complete.

recommendation: Convert to paid — 2 loads completed. Send $350/mo agreement.
outcome: Converted to paid. Regular carrier.
lesson: 2+ trial loads = high conversion probability.
